title: Language Change -  Device is out-of-date
scenario: Device language change triggers firmware update prompt when headset is not on latest firmware, and update completes successfully returning user to Home screen
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on Android.
3. Tap on the device name to open Device Settings.
4. In Device Settings, locate and tap on the language option.
5. Select a new language from the list.
6. Observe the popup that appears: 'You must update the software to apply the selected language. The language change only applies to audio' with 'Later' and 'Update now' buttons.
8. Wait for the firmware update (DFU) process to complete.
9. After the update completes, observe the Home screen.
expected: After the firmware update completes, the language change is applied successfully on both the app and device, and the user is returned to the Home screen.
